name: HealthPerformance
privacy_notes: serviceNotes contains clinical notes — sensitive health data, restrict to contract parties
provisionalDiagnosis is health data — restrict to contract parties
clinicalInterpretation contains diagnostic outputs — restrict to contract parties
artifactsGenerated are references to clinical documents — restrict to contract parties
deletionAttestation is a compliance record — restrict to contract parties and NFO
serviceLocation may identify patient visit patterns — treat as PII-adjacent
